erinoverview.bio: Erin is responsible for IT operations and the rollout of Egeria across Coco Pharmaceuticals. She sees the broadest view of the metadata landscape and is the natural starting point for anyone new to the system.
highlights: Full view across all Explorer tabs
Sees governance zones, glossary, and data assets
Good starting point for understanding the whole environment

peterprofile.bio: Peter is the CDO driving Coco's data governance strategy. He focuses on how Egeria's solution blueprints and governance frameworks connect business goals to data practices.
highlights: Solution Architect tab — blueprints and components
Perspectives tab — governance viewpoints
ISC tab — information supply chains

calliequartile.bio: Callie works with clinical and research data. She relies on the glossary for standard definitions, data design for understanding data structures, and lineage to trust her datasets.
highlights: Data Design tab — data structures and schemas
Glossary tab — standard business terms
ISC tab — data lineage and provenance

garygeeke.bio: Gary manages Coco's IT infrastructure. He uses Egeria to understand how systems connect, what types are deployed, and how the governance engine keeps everything compliant.
highlights: Type System tab — Egeria's open metadata types
Governance tab — rules and compliance status
Digital Products — deployed system assets

ivorpadlock.bio: Ivor is responsible for data privacy and security at Coco. He uses Egeria's governance zones and classifications to ensure sensitive data is properly controlled and auditable.
highlights: Governance tab — security classifications
Perspectives tab — security viewpoints
Glossary — privacy-sensitive term definitions

faithbroker.bio: Faith manages Coco's people and organisational data. She uses Egeria to track team structures, roles, and the governance responsibilities assigned to staff.
highlights: Perspectives tab — organisational roles and teams
Governance tab — responsibility assignments
Glossary — HR term definitions

pollytasker.bio: Polly coordinates cross-functional projects at Coco. She uses Egeria to track project metadata, understand data dependencies, and ensure new initiatives are properly governed.
highlights: Solution Architect tab — project-linked blueprints
ISC tab — data flows for project deliverables
Perspectives tab — project stakeholder views

tomtally.bio: Tom manages Coco's financial accounts and reporting. He relies on Egeria to trace data lineage for regulatory submissions and verify that financial figures are derived from trustworthy, governed sources.
highlights: ISC tab — lineage for financial reporting data
Glossary — finance and accounting term definitions
Data Design — financial data structures and schemas

lemmiestage.bio: Lemmie owns Coco's data staging pipelines — the processes that ingest, validate, and prepare data before it enters production systems. He uses Egeria to track what is in-flight and ensure staging datasets are properly catalogued.
highlights: ISC tab — staging pipeline flows and lineage
Data Design — staging dataset schemas
Governance tab — data quality rules for ingestion

juleskeeper.bio: Jules is responsible for Coco's records retention and archival policies. She uses Egeria to classify data assets by retention schedule, track disposal obligations, and ensure records are discoverable for audit.
highlights: Governance tab — retention classifications and policies
Glossary — records and compliance term definitions
Perspectives tab — regulatory viewpoints

stewfaster.bio: Stew is a data steward responsible for the quality and consistency of Coco's core reference datasets. He curates glossary definitions, resolves duplicate assets, and works with data owners to keep the catalogue accurate.
highlights: Glossary — term curation and duplicate resolution
Data Design — reference data management
Governance tab — stewardship assignments and quality scores
